use_codes.desc: NASAL TREATMENT OF SEASONAL AND PERENNIAL ALLERGIC RHINITIS SYMPTOMS
NASAL TREATMENT OF SEASONAL AND PERENNIAL ALLERGIC RHINITIS SYMPTOMS

indications.text:
RHINOCORT AQUA Nasal Spray is indicated for the
management of nasal symptoms of seasonal or perennial
allergic rhinitis in adults and children six years of age and
older.

management of nasal symptoms of seasonal or perennial
allergic rhinitis in adults and children six years of age and
older.

This label may not be the latest approved by FDA.
For current labeling information, please visit https://www.fda.gov/drugsatfda
